calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-01-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Brown, via zoom, for Amy Harrington, via zoom, Administrator; Kenya Helton and Sheena Helton, via zoom, in propria persona, Beneficiaries.

The court confirms with Sheena Helton that despite the declaration that she filed on Mar-24-2022, she is not appearing today to object to the instant petition. The court points both Sheena and Kenya to the relief the court will order if the petition is granted. Both Beneficiaries advise that they are not appearing today to oppose.

After additional discussion, the Accounting Petition is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Kahler. Not reported.
